news.title: 美国沉船寻宝者出狱 500枚金币下落成谜
news.title0: Treasure hunter freed from jail after refusing to turn over shipwreck gold
news.content: 美国深海寻宝者汤米·汤普森因拒绝透露沉船金币下落被监禁十年后获释，仍有500枚金币下落不明。
news.content0: A US deep-sea treasure hunter who refused to disclose the location of a famed shipwreck's gold coins has been released from prison after a decade, with 500 coins still unaccounted for.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 伊朗女足三名成员放弃在澳庇护回国
news.title0: Three more Iran football team members change minds over asylum
news.content: 伊朗女足代表团中三名获得澳大利亚人道主义签证的成员改变主意，决定放弃庇护申请返回伊朗。
news.content0: Three more members of the Iranian women's football delegation - who were given humanitarian visas to stay in Australia - have changed their mind and will return home.
news.author: BBC

news.title: “颜值最大化”：男性极端美容风潮兴起
news.title0: Sculpting jaws, giving scores: Inside the world of looksmaxxing
news.content: 全球兴起“颜值最大化”风潮，年轻男性通过极端健身、护肤甚至危险手术追求“完美”外貌，引发社会担忧。
news.content0: Marvin ponders his attractiveness before giving himself "a solid 7/10". With a bit more work, he feels he could improve.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 特朗普呼吁多国派军舰赴霍尔木兹海峡
news.title0: Trump urges UK and other nations to send warships to Strait of Hormuz
news.content: 美国总统特朗普呼吁英国、中国、法国等多国向霍尔木兹海峡派遣军舰，以协助确保这一关键航道的安全。
news.content0: Donald Trump has urged the UK and other nations to send warships to the Strait of Hormuz to help secure the key shipping route out of the Middle East.
news.author: BBC

news.title: “战争赌局”引争议 美预测市场面临审查
news.title0: 'Gruesome' war bets fuel calls for crackdown on prediction markets
news.content: 美国预测市场平台出现针对伊朗战争等事件的“战争赌局”，引发非法及道德争议，监管机构面临审查压力。
news.content0: Stew, a 35-year-old from Montana, has enjoyed dabbling in sports bets since he downloaded the Kalshi app about 18 months ago.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 马赛市长选举成法国政治风向标
news.title0: Marseille’s Tight Mayoral Race Is a Bellwether for France’s Future
news.content: 法国第二大城市马赛的市长选举进入第二轮，极右翼候选人有望首次胜出，被视为明年总统大选的重要风向标。
news.content0: Franck Allisio and Benoît Payan do not agree on much. But they do share an instinct that the neck-and-neck election campaign they are running to be the mayor of Marseille could reverberate far beyond this ancient, polyglot Mediterranean port.
news.author: NYTimes

news.title: 冰岛“首席熔岩冷却师”备战下一次火山喷发
news.title0: Iceland’s Chief ‘Lava Cooler’ Is Bracing for the Next Eruption
news.content: 冰岛消防员赫尔吉·赫约莱夫松在火山喷发中领导团队冷却熔岩以保护城镇，被誉为“首席熔岩冷却师”，正为下一次喷发做准备。
news.content0: As a swarm of earthquakes and volcanic eruptions began to rip through southwestern Iceland inlate 2023, a firefighter named Helgi Hjorleifsson jumped into action.
news.author: NYTimes

news.title: Meta收购AI机器人社交网络Moltbook
news.title0: Meta just bought the social network for AI bots everyone’s been talking about
news.content: Meta公司宣布收购AI机器人社交网络Moltbook，该平台以AI智能体自主互动为特色，旨在增强其AI竞争力。
news.content0: Meta, the company behind some of the world’s most popular social media platforms, just scooped up a new site – for bots.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 日本网红猴子“潘趣”终于融入群体
news.title0: Punch the monkey is finally making friends and fitting in
news.content: 曾因被同伴欺负而抱着玩偶寻求安慰的日本网红猴子“潘趣”，经过数月适应，现已成功融入猴群，与同伴友好相处。
news.content0: Images of him being bullied by his enclosure-mates, retreating to safety and clinging to aplushie look-alikefor comfort won hearts around the world.
news.author: CNN
